nodes.name: agent-sort.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/agent-sort` that redirects users to the canonical `agent-sort` skill in `skills/agent-sort/SKILL.md`, preserving backward compatibility while deprecating direct command invocations.

nodes.name: claw.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/claw` that redirects to the `nanoclaw-repl` skill and provides delegation hints for operating or extending the NanoClaw REPL via `scripts/claw.js`.

nodes.name: context-budget.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/context-budget` that redirects to the `context-budget` skill, passing through optional `--verbose` flag and defaulting to a 200K context window assumption.

nodes.name: devfleet.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/devfleet` that redirects to the `claude-devfleet` skill, providing delegation guidance for multi-agent mission planning and structured reporting.

nodes.name: docs.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for the docs command that redirects users to the canonical docs skill, serving as a compatibility entry point while command-first usage is retired.

nodes.name: e2e.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/e2e` that redirects to the canonical E2E testing skill, maintaining backward compatibility for users invoking the old command surface.

nodes.name: eval.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/eval` that redirects to the canonical eval skill, providing a compatibility entry point as command-first usage is deprecated.

nodes.name: orchestrate.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/orchestrate` that redirects to `dmux-workflows` for parallel execution or `autonomous-agent-harness` for persistent loops and governance, distinguishing use cases in its delegation section.

nodes.name: prompt-optimize.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/prompt-optimize` that redirects to the canonical prompt optimization skill, serving as a backward-compatible entry point.

nodes.name: rules-distill.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/rules-distill` that redirects to the `rules-distill` skill, explicitly discouraging duplication of the inventory, cross-read, and verdict workflow logic.

nodes.name: tdd.md
nodes.summary: Legacy slash-command shim for `/tdd` that redirects to the canonical TDD workflow skill, maintaining backward compatibility for test-driven development command invocations.
